_comment: CANONICAL scoring rules — single source of truth for the Python harvester AND the extension. Generated from harvest.py so regexes are verbatim. Both engines load this; parity tests (scoring/parity_fixtures.json) guarantee identical verdicts. Regex strings use only the Python/JS common subset (no lookbehind); compile case-insensitively.

regex.hybrid_flags: \b(hybrid|on-?site|in-?office|in person|days?\s+(?:per week\s+)?in (?:the )?office|must reside in|must live in|located in|relocat|commut)\b
regex.remote_anywhere_flags: \b(fully remote|100% remote|work from anywhere|remote from anywhere|located in any|any (?:us )?state|anywhere in the (?:us|united states)|(?:reside|located|live)\s+in the (?:us|u\.s\.?|usa|united states))\b
regex.function_exclude: \bengineer(ing)?\b|\bdeveloper\b|\bsoftware\b|\bdevops\b|\bdata scien|\bmachine learning\b|\bproduct\b|\bdesign(er)?\b|\bux\b|\bui\b|\bsales\b|account (?:executive|manager|director)|business development|\bpartnership|\bgtm\b|go[-\s]?to[-\s]?market|\bmarketing\b|\bbrand\b|demand gen|growth marketer|communications|\bcounsel\b|\battorney\b|\bparalegal\b|\blegal\b|\brecruit|talent acquisition|people operations|human resources|people partner|\bprocurement\b|supply chain|customer success|client success|customer experience|\bcx\b|solutions (?:engineer|consultant|lead|architect)|sales engineer|pre[-\s]?sales|science liaison|medical affairs|\bheor\b|market access|\bphysician\b|\bpharmacist\b|psychiatrist|psychologist|\btherapist\b|nurse practitioner|physician assistant|dietitian|social worker
